meanings.definition: the formation of vesicles in or beneath the skin

examples: Her feet blistered during the long hike
The Senator blistered the administration in his speech on Friday
the tight shoes and perspiration blistered her feet
an acerbic tone piercing otherwise flowery prose
her acrid remarks make her many enemies
caustic jokes about political assassination, talk-show hosts and medical ethics

meanings.definition: hot enough to raise (or as if to raise) blisters
very fast; capable of quick response and great speed
examples: got off to a hot start
